overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player exploring a luxury apartment with neon-lit hallways, entering an office space, then exiting to a Japanese-inspired rooftop garden with illuminated stone lanterns and a futuristic city skyline backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit apartment corridor with glass railing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow corridor illuminated by pink neon ceiling lights and wall sconces

entered.detail: continuous pink neon light strips running along the ceiling of the corridor
glass panel railing with metallic frame running along the right side of the hallway
modern wall-mounted light fixture with warm yellow illumination
colorful abstract artwork mounted on the wall at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow, upscale apartment corridor bathed in pink neon light. Glass railings line the right side while modern wall sconces provide warm accent lighting on the left. An abstract painting hangs at the far end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment office with city view

events.description: enters a spacious office room from the neon corridor, lighting shifts from neon to warm artificial

agents.ego_description: entering a dimly lit office space and looking around at the desk and window view

entered.detail: large executive desk with papers and items on surface, illuminated by overhead spots
floor-to-ceiling window revealing a sprawling futuristic cityscape with illuminated buildings
modern white storage cabinet with multiple drawers
recessed ceiling lights providing focused illumination on the desk area

segments.scene_description: The player enters a luxurious office space with a large wooden desk at the center. The room features a panoramic window overlooking a neon-lit futuristic cityscape at night. The lighting shifts from vibrant corridor neons to subdued, warm interior spots.

events.description: exits the office room back into the neon-lit corridor

agents.ego_description: walking back through the corridor toward glass exit doors leading outside

entered.detail: large glass double doors with metallic frames leading to the exterior terrace

segments.scene_description: The player exits the office and returns through the neon corridor, now heading toward large glass doors at the far end. The pink neon lighting returns as the office space is left behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: Japanese-inspired rooftop garden with city views

events.description: exits the building onto an outdoor rooftop terrace with Japanese garden elements

agents.ego_description: walking through an outdoor rooftop garden, observing the illuminated stone lanterns and city skyline

entered.detail: traditional Japanese stone pagoda-style lanterns with warm internal lighting placed along the pathway
sculpted pine trees with dramatic upward lighting highlighting the trunks and branches
traditional East Asian style building with curved roof and red accent lighting
horizontal metal railings marking the edge of the rooftop terrace
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signage
large digital advertising screens with pink and red graphics on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The player emerges onto a stunning rooftop Japanese garden at night, featuring illuminated stone pagoda lanterns and sculptural pine trees with uplighting. A traditional pagoda-style building stands to the right while the futuristic neon-lit city skyline stretches into the distance. The wet pavement reflects the ambient lighting as the player explores the serene outdoor space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the vibrant, neon-lit interior of a luxury apartment out into a serene, futuristic rooftop garden. It begins by moving through a narrow corridor bathed in pink neon light and warm accent sconces, passing glass railings toward an abstract painting. As the camera enters a luxurious office, the lighting shifts to subdued interior spots, centering on a large wooden desk before a panoramic window overlooking a glowing cityscape. The scene then retreats back through the pink neon hallway, moving toward large glass doors that lead outside. Finally, the camera emerges onto a wet-pavement rooftop garden featuring illuminated stone pagoda lanterns and sculptural pine trees, with a traditional pagoda building standing against the backdrop of a sprawling, neon-lit skyline.
